sentence: At the party, no one came over to talk to you.
Your colleagues invited you to lunch and made you feel welcome.
The audience laughed warmly with you during your story.
Your boss singled out your work as exceptional in the meeting.
Everyone in the group listened carefully when you spoke.
You tripped on stage in front of the entire audience.
The host smiled and offered you their seat at the table.
Your friend gave you a long, warm hug after the show.
You delivered the presentation calmly and answered every question.
The boss publicly criticised your report in front of the team.
